description: You are an energy systems engineer commissioning a solar PV and battery storage monitoring system. The BMS controller is sending data to Emoncms at http://localhost (login: admin / admin) under node 'pvbms' with channels: solar_w, battery_soc, battery_charge_w, and battery_discharge_w. No feeds are currently configured. Configure the data pipeline by creating appropriately named and tagged feeds and process lists for all channels, including a Power-to-kWh energy accumulation feed for the solar generation channel. Build a dashboard named 'Solar Storage Monitor' containing at least 4 widgets displaying the key metrics.
